'''Gorrlyn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. She was [[Salporin/Legends|Salporin's]] wife and participated in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] during the final days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Gorrlyn and her spouse were both enslaved and separated. Salporin would die defending [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], widowing Gorrlyn.

Gorrlyn was among Chewbacca's family and friends who attended his [[Funeral of Chewbacca|funeral]].
